overall.description: A first-person perspective shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a slow pan across a dimly lit Asian-inspired food stall kitchen with red lanterns, revealing a missing person poster, food preparation trays, and two workers standing at a counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall kitchen with steam vents

agents.ego_description: slowly moving left past a missing person poster while observing the kitchen workers

notable_agents.action: two kitchen workers in white uniforms standing side by side at the counter facing away from camera

entered.detail: teal and yellow missing person poster with photo and reward information
glowing red spherical paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling
concrete service counter where workers are stationed
metal preparation surface in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly left past a prominent missing person poster in a dimly lit cyberpunk kitchen. Red lanterns hang from the ceiling casting a warm glow, while two workers in white uniforms stand at a concrete counter ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: food preparation area with steam and cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left across the food preparation area revealing trays of food

notable_agents.action: two kitchen workers remain stationary at the counter, one appears to be handling items

entered.detail: metal tray with cooked burger patties and buns on the prep table
tray with packaged food items in yellow and red wrapping
green neon light visible on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning left across stainless steel food preparation trays containing burger patties and packaged meals. The missing poster moves out of view as the focus shifts to the food items, with a green neon strip visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: service counter with steam and hanging lanterns

events.description: camera stops moving and settles into a static observation position behind the workers

agents.ego_description: standing still behind the two workers, watching them work at the counter

notable_agents.action: two workers standing side by side at the counter, one appears to be wiping or handling something
third worker visible through the service window on the left side

entered.detail: opening in the wall showing the service area beyond
metal exhaust hood above the cooking area with steam rising

segments.scene_description: The camera comes to a stop behind the two workers, settling into a static view of them working at the counter. Steam rises around the red lanterns as they continue their tasks, with a third worker visible through the service window on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous pan across a dimly lit cyberpunk kitchen that shifts from a focus on a missing person poster to a view of the staff at work. It begins by gliding left past a prominent missing person poster under the warm glow of hanging red lanterns, with two workers in white uniforms visible at a concrete counter ahead. As the camera continues its movement, the poster slides out of view and the focus shifts across stainless steel trays filled with burger patties and packaged meals, while a green neon strip illuminates the left wall. The scene then settles into a static position behind the two workers, where steam rises around the lanterns as they perform their tasks. Finally, the view expands to reveal a third worker visible through a service window on the left.
